backstory.original: Delina is a young sorceress (by elven standards) with an inquisitive mind and fearless personality. Her pale skin and hair may give off the initial impression of vulnerability, but she carries great strength within.
backstory.display: 德丽娜是一位年轻的术士（依据精灵的标准），具有好奇的心灵和无畏的个性。她苍白的皮肤和头发初看或许显得孱弱，但她内心有着强大的力量。

description.original: A small blast of fire hits a single random enemy
description.display: 射出一小团火焰攻击一名随机敌人。

description.original: Delina's eyes begin to glow as she loses herself in her magic.
description.display: 德丽娜沉浸在魔法之中，她的双眼开始发光。

longDescription.original: Delina's eyes begin to glow as she loses herself in her magic, attacking faster and causing her Surge of Power ability to not reset for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 德丽娜沉浸在魔法之中，她的双眼开始发光，攻击速度加快，同时她的能量涌动技能在 15 秒内不会被重置。

description.desc: Increase the damage of $source by $(not_buffed amount)% each time they attack, up to a max of 10 stacks. Stacks reset 10 seconds after reaching max stacks or after not attacking for 10 seconds
$source每次攻击时提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，最多堆叠 10 层。在堆叠满 10 层的 10 秒后，或 10 秒钟未进行攻击后，层数重置

tipText.original: Delina's damage fluctuates over time, waxing and waning as she blasts enemies relentlessly with her magic.
tipText.display: 德丽娜的伤害会随着时间的推移而波动。用魔法无情地轰炸敌人时，她的伤害起伏消长。

description.desc: Whenever $source attacks, there is a $chance% chance that their spell will burn for an additional $amount% damage over 6 seconds
$source攻击时有 $chance% 几率使法术燃烧，在 6 秒内造成 $amount% 额外伤害

specializationDescription.original: Delina focuses on increasing the extra damage done by her Empowered Spells.
specializationDescription.display: 德丽娜专注于提高强化咒语造成的额外伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Delina focuses on increasing the bonus damage from her Surge of Power.
specializationDescription.display: 德丽娜专注于提高能量涌动的额外伤害。

description.desc: Increase the damage of $source by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in front of them in the formation, and by an additional $(not_buffed amount)% for each Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每个位于$source前方的勇士均使其伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，并且阵型中的每个“博德之门的英雄们”勇士均使伤害额外提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Delina deals additional damage if she's further back in the formation. Put her near the back to maximize the effect!
tipText.display: 德丽娜位于阵型最后方时会造成额外伤害。尽量将她放置在后方，从而充分利用此效果！

description.desc: Whenever $source attacks, there is a $chance% chance that they will copy their attack on another target
$source攻击时有 $chance% 几率复制自身攻击，并对另一个目标发动复制的攻击

description.original: Wild magic? You don't know the half of it.
description.display: 野魔法？你对此一无所知。

description.original: You think to steal my power? Think again!
description.display: 你想偷走我的力量？好好再想想！
明斯克！闪避的意思就是让你躲开！

description.original: Don't worry, I've got you covered.
I think this is going to work. Just maybe stand still?
description.display: 我觉得这样会有用的。或者，就站着不动？

description.original: Can you feel it? Boiling inside you?
description.display: 你能感觉到吗？你身体内的沸腾？

description.original: There's wisdom in youth, as well!
I'm not really in control here!
